description: Observable is a web platform for creating and sharing reactive JavaScript notebooks and related data visualizations, analysis, and apps. It also publishes Observable Framework, a Node-based tool for building and deploying static data apps.
summary: Observable exposes a documented notebook download/embed HTTP API at `https://api.observablehq.com` authenticated with workspace API keys or notebook keys, plus the npm-distributed `observable` Framework CLI; no public GraphQL or MCP surface was found.

surfaces.name: Observable notebook download and embed API
